reference: I am forty-seven years old. My height is five feet eight inches. I weigh seventy-five kilograms. I am mildly hypertensive but it is under control. I underwent a vasectomy twelve years ago. I would like to undergo a reversal of vasectomy to have a new baby. I would like to know about the cost of the reversal of vasectomy operation at Christian Medical College Vellore.
text: I am 47 years old. My height is 5 feet 8 inches. I weigh 75 kilograms. I am mildly hypertensive, but it is under control. I underwent a vasectomy 12 years ago. I would like to undergo a reversal of vasectomy to have a new baby. I would like to know about the cost of the reversal of vasectomy operation at Christian Medical College, Delores.
